assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: The response clearly identifies different channels and includes a dev environment validation section specifically mentioning dev clusters on Rapid channel running 1.32+ as canaries for prod

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions no SSH access to nodes, debugging via Cloud Logging only, mandatory resource requests, and includes a dedicated section on Autopilot-specific notes explaining simplified operations

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: While it mentions checking GKE deprecation insights dashboard and deprecated API usage, it doesn't provide specific kubectl commands for API deprecation checks

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Resource requests are explicitly marked as mandatory for Autopilot with bold formatting in multiple sections and explained in the Autopilot-specific notes

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes PDBs configured for critical workloads, no bare pods requirement, and terminationGracePeriodSeconds for graceful shutdown

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes specific gcloud and kubectl commands for verifying control plane version and node versions

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes comprehensive workload health checks including deployments, pods status, StatefulSets, and application health checks

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes dev environment validation section recommending testing on dev clusters running 1.32+ and mentions dev clusters as perfect canaries in the Autopilot notes

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: While it mentions 72h advance warning via Cloud Logging, it doesn't specifically mention the ~1 month advance notice available from checking the GKE release schedule
Both pre and post-upgrade checklists include comprehensive monitoring items including baseline metrics, Cloud Monitoring, error rates, latency measurements, and observability pipeline validation
